title: CGEL Roadmap
description: Long-horizon planning material at .cgel/roadmap.json, managed only by `cgel roadmap` verbs (direct edits stay gated as a governance path). Deliberately excluded from the governance bundle: it exists to be written mid-task, so it is never part of the sealed measure. The shipped reader is hand-rolled (stdlib only) but mirrors these constraints.

entries.description: Keyed R-1, R-2, ... in creation order.

kind.description: verification-recipe records HOW to prove the project works (build, bring-up, e2e interaction, what to inspect), so the loop can turn it into registered checks

next_id.description: Counter for the next R-N id; recomputed from entries when missing.
